## Goal

## Scope

## Risk tier

- [ ] Tier 0: copy, docs, metadata
- [ ] Tier 1: contained UI or content behavior
- [ ] Tier 2+: data, learning logic, audio, privacy, or architecture

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Mobile and keyboard interaction checked
- [ ] zh-TW and English checked

## Safety and privacy

- [ ] No secrets or personal feedback data committed
- [ ] Public feedback fields remain bounded and validated
